he360ebe4gae66g402cgbda0gaaa4e5878f16: Master Halsin was a First Druid. None of us can match him in power.
h02aedbc5g6eaag4021ga2b9g12569d0d837e: The grove suffered because of Halsin. We have no need of him. Not anymore.
h27261d62g7f61g4252gabacg8eec7adcfef0: I still can't believe Master Halsin is dead.
h70a0d2fegded3g4b98ga511gdafdbddb206a: I can. He let in outsiders, then rushed off - he's made one mistake after the other.
h191e6d76gb7b0g4febga108g657d39795e4e: What will we do without a First Druid?
h6ccf2c4eg39dfg4934g8bd3gb710d3dff667: Exactly as we have always done - tend this grove. Nothing has changed.
hf5b13cc7gfef0g45ceg9f2ag5696b149d5a8: Master Halsin's past his prime. It might be time for another.
ha7df5301g53e8g4788gad4dg68a0bc7b30d4: Oh? Because things went so well with Kagha?
hd0386a48g7acfg4271g8103gb8faaf9ee029: If it had been up to Kagha, they would never have been here at all.
hc53c06ebg4dfbg400bgb652g262921586f7a: I'm no fan of those devils either, but they're leaving.
h641ca8a5gf491g4a55gb033gfd55a549507b: Master Halsin's home - by Silvanus' mercy.
hdaf3e32ag46e8g41d1g8816g75109a64f003: It might've been better if he stayed away.
h336c1161g1241g46f4gb960g988222523bec: Come now. He took IN those strays, and then he just left!
h39c01ff6g08dcg48b4g939eg903dd6557434: He went to make sure those 'strays' could go.
h5ca06346gd509g4c71gb63cgd0a5af6b3946: The ritual was flawed. It could've damaged the grove.
h4dbdb7a7gac50g408bg9457g135290a981df: And if the goblins get in here?
hd35f7a63g0c8dg47adga346g0b0864f82c93: What will happen to the grove? To us?
hbef5eaabga910g4de4g9d5fg57773f7ba356: We'll find another way to stop them. We must.
hf732cc0fga7e3g4467g88f9g007b6fc406a8: We might as well lay down and let the goblins cut us up.
h6a243099gd0c1g4defg8fadgb701801d6e35: They'll have to cut through all those tieflings first.
h1b0ff59cg4e3dg4c78g87c5g7cfdc7b1ea4a: Like that'll do any good! That ritual was our salvation.
h769cc6feg7395g4598gaa38gca9b02bf4c1d: It was steeped in shadow magic!
h350c9538ge9d5g4053g9617gadc4f350e60d: Stopping the ritual was the right thing to do.
hf14864a2g77d2g4a16g82ddg016862a6d416: But to not even consult with us?
h60ecbcb1g56ecg49fbgb03dg26012125f355: Are you the one doubting her now?
h6dc71fe2gffe9g402agaa26gc8a6ecb7fbd6: O-of course not! But this was our best defence!
hfd663315g455dg4847g9d14gd78e4ebfb879: This isn't why I became a druid.
h9363e132g70d6g4581g81c3gdd147dbaca24: It's not that. I just wish there was another way.
h9323a445g5bc9g4645ga69fgeb85d10f99ec: Never took you for a coward.
hc40362deg8913g471dgac85g1e32180fa741: I pray the tieflings realise we are not to be trifled with.
h68b332aega4f1g4e91ga597g55d5ab40d67a: I just hope they leave, and we can close this grove in peace.
h12e47703g2b3cg4b73g9b4bgc6bee5d19231: And if it comes to a fight? You'll not shy away from bloodshed I hope.
h549192a1g8a82g4d50g9770gfc186490beb6: Since when did we become killers?
hfcfb64ccge4d5g4cdfg9ab0g5bc206ffb523: If only we'd never let the tieflings in... the child might have lived.
h5842d463g2bd3g4d37g9697gee527f3bbca4: You have master Halsin to blame for that.
ha342aef1g1e8cg41e7g9eeegb4f0345a8d56: I can't believe he just left...
h71ee5e41g6edcg4350ga8a2g6a23e79575fc: He lost sight of what is important.
h2d85d1d7g2996g4990g9f35gddb6c3a7e91c: I don't want blood on my hands.
hb3535049g6bd9g4028g80eagbd12056edaf8: We have the right to defend our home.
h9e035d8dg9adcg410egb780g2f481745ea17: So that's what you want? To kill a bunch of innocents?
ha8d7d57ag608cg46b1gad23g776620a0e8b5: I don't want to kill anyone - but I won't let this grove be harmed. Not again.
h957196a1g184eg438cg8931gec08e048215f: This will all be over. The ritual's almost finished.
h22a956d1g9b40g4f14g8799gcf1d22e8deda: What if they try to steal from us? Again?
hcf64f15fgf7afg4e74ga3bfg7fee8234a9df: We've shown them once - we take grove law seriously.
h474ce2eegdf6eg4060gb622g8a07865e08f3: By letting that child escape without consequence?
h4dbe4cf4g8a42g42b7g9167gcdbab6dc2428: We might as well have lain on the ground and let them trample us.
h696b204cgfbdfg458fg9c3bg5ad092aecfcd: Ridiculous. We just let her run off?
h4e434cb1gc258g4834g9c03g6ebdf6a46cf6: A devil child. One who tried to steal from us.
he632670cg1f83g451cgb0a8g6959dbf8ba62: Yet she failed - that's what matters.
